calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-12-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Heather Stoneman for Henry Carrey.

The Court noted that statutory fees being paid without a Court order is not permissible, raised the issue of other fees that were paid out and questions whether it is appropriate to pay fees on time spent that did not benefit the estate when discovering that the estate value exceeded $150,000.00. Ms. Stoneman stated that statutory fees only were put in the attorney trust account, that the Executor goes to Puerto Vallarta six months out of the year and that the checks are sitting in the drawer. The Court noted that no interest was paid on those funds. Ms. Stoneman stated that she is happy to reimburse the interest, that initially the Executor was not her Client, that it was the Beneficiary, that the matter went all kinds of ways, that there was a lot of drama between the parties, that it ended up being very time consuming and that it was more time than what she billed for. The First Account and Report of Executor, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-12-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Heather Stoneman for Henry Carrey (Petitioner).

The Court noted that there was no appearance at the August 30th hearing and raised the issue of diligent search for potential heirs. Ms. Stoneman apologized for her absence at the last hearing, stated that they did people finders, census searches, and ancestry, that they had a Trust document from the Decedent's half Brother and that it lead the Executor to believe there are no heirs of the Brother. Ms. Stoneman also stated that the estate has about $30,000.00, that they thought it was $90,000.00, but it's not, and that she has no leads. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters of Testamentary is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-30-2017 Continued To Oct-10-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to October 10, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
